Off Calendar Feb-04-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Carolyn M. Kennedy, Esq., Law Offices of K.J. Petsas, PC (650) 624-8155 for Defendant and Moving Party Harris
David Grassi, Plaintiff Propria Persona and Opposing Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT FRED HARRIS' Motion To Strike: OFF CALENDAR as moot. Attorney Kennedy shall prepare and submit a proposed form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer And Demurrer To Second And Fourth Causes Of Action And To Pltf'S Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-04-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Carolyn M. Kennedy, Esq., Law Offices of K.J. Petsas, PC (650) 624-8155 for Defendant and Moving Party Harris
David Grassi, Plaintiff Propria Persona and Opposing Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT FRED HARRIS' Demurrer To Second And Fourth Causes Of Action And To Plaintiff's Third Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend; Plaintiff shall file and serve his Fourth Amended Complaint no later than 02/14/05. If Plaintiff to state the elements for causes of action and a demurrer is filed, it will be sustained without leave. Pursuant to CCP 473, Attorney Kennedy is entitled to reasonable attorney fees and costs in regard to this demurrer upon application. Attorney Kennedy shall prepare and submit a proposed form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
